creator: grio@free.next.com
text:
Default kernel does not have ktrace enabled;  this is annoying, since
tracing is very useful, esp. at install time.

For example, my nfs mounts are hanging, and I don't know why.
Ktrace would help.

Fix: 

add line "options KTRACE" to default kernel
How-To-Repeat: 
	install 950412 snap and ktrace program
